/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/board_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/move_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_engine.dir/src/uci.cpp.o -o chess_engine
